description: Recto: Legal document from Cairo involving Saadya ha-Kohen Me'ili (?) and Hayyim Luki (?) a resident of Alexandria, possibly dated Tammuz 1788 CE (תצמיח i.e. [5]548). This dating is confirmed by the fact that R. Meīr Ben-Naʿīm signed as a witness and 1788 falls inside the years of his potential lifespan. Needs further examination for the content. Verso: accounts that mention the surname Alarcon. ASE. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
